exampleSentence: The benevolent teacher always helped her students.

definition: careful to avoid danger or mistakes
exampleSentence: She was cautious when crossing the busy road.

definition: having or showing care in one's work
exampleSentence: The diligent student always completed her homework on time.

definition: fluent or persuasive in speaking or writing
exampleSentence: He gave an eloquent speech at the school assembly.
